strategy.name: BTC Alpha-Trend Crossover (Evolved v2)
strategy.description: Dual moving average crossover strategy optimized for tracking medium-term momentum changes on BTC.
strategy.riskExplanation: Trend following strategies perform well in sustained trending markets, but suffer from consecutive drawdown periods (whipsaws) in sideways markets.
riskWarnings: Slight lag in entry signals due to moving average smoothing

evaluation.recommendation: Balanced return ratio. Recommend adjusting take-profit windows outward by +1.5% to run trends further.
